_doc: The Dark (DRK) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/drk.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 41C / 43U / 35R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet (C3/C1) + uncommon sheet (U2 uncommons / U1 rares). Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set, 119 cards. Page states 40 commons (C3) + 1 C1 (Maze of Ith) = 41 commons recorded; 43 uncommons (U2); 35 rares (U1). Only two physical sheets exist. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
